create table `agri_weighings` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `lot_id` bigint unsigned null, `cooperative_id` bigint unsigned null, `producer_name` varchar(191) null, `gross_weight` decimal(15, 3) not null default '0', `tare_weight` decimal(15, 3) not null default '0', `net_weight` decimal(15, 3) not null default '0', `moisture_percent` decimal(8, 2) not null default '0', `quality_grade` varchar(64) null, `weighing_date` date not null, `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `agri_cold_storage_records` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `lot_id` bigint unsigned null, `facility_name` varchar(191) not null, `chamber_name` varchar(191) null, `temperature` decimal(8, 2) null, `humidity` decimal(8, 2) null, `quantity` decimal(15, 3) not null default '0', `entry_date` date not null, `expiry_date` date null, `status` enum('stored', 'released', 'blocked') not null default 'stored', `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `agri_export_shipments` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `lot_id` bigint unsigned null, `shipment_ref` varchar(191) not null, `customer_name` varchar(191) not null, `destination_country` varchar(191) not null, `container_no` varchar(191) null, `incoterm` varchar(32) null, `shipped_quantity` decimal(15, 3) not null default '0', `departure_date` date not null, `status` enum('draft', 'ready', 'shipped', 'delivered') not null default 'draft', `document_ref` varchar(191) null, `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'
alter table `agri_export_shipments` add unique `agri_export_shipments_shipment_ref_created_by_unique`(`shipment_ref`, `created_by`)

create table `cash_registers` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `name` varchar(191) not null, `location` varchar(191) null, `opening_balance` decimal(15, 2) not null default '0', `current_balance` decimal(15, 2) not null default '0', `status` enum('open', 'closed') not null default 'open', `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `cash_movements` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `cash_register_id` bigint unsigned not null, `type` enum('in', 'out') not null, `amount` decimal(15, 2) not null, `movement_date` date not null, `reference` varchar(191) null, `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `loyalty_accounts` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `customer_id` bigint unsigned not null, `code` varchar(191) not null, `points_balance` int not null default '0', `tier` varchar(64) not null default 'standard', `status` enum('active', 'inactive') not null default 'active', `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'
alter table `loyalty_accounts` add unique `loyalty_accounts_code_created_by_unique`(`code`, `created_by`)

create table `delivery_routes` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `delivery_note_id` bigint unsigned null, `name` varchar(191) not null, `driver_name` varchar(191) null, `vehicle_no` varchar(191) null, `route_date` date not null, `status` enum('planned', 'in_transit', 'completed') not null default 'planned', `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'
insert into `migrations` (`migration`, `batch`) values ('2026_03_12_050100_create_retail_operations_tables', 21)

create table `emergency_visits` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `patient_id` bigint unsigned not null, `triage_level` varchar(32) not null, `chief_complaint` varchar(191) not null, `arrived_at` datetime not null, `attending_doctor` varchar(191) null, `status` enum('waiting', 'in_care', 'discharged', 'admitted') not null default 'waiting', `disposition` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `imaging_orders` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `patient_id` bigint unsigned not null, `consultation_id` bigint unsigned null, `modality` varchar(64) not null, `body_part` varchar(191) null, `requested_by` varchar(191) null, `scheduled_at` datetime null, `status` enum('ordered', 'scheduled', 'completed', 'reviewed') not null default 'ordered', `report_summary` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `nursing_cares` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `patient_id` bigint unsigned not null, `hospital_admission_id` bigint unsigned null, `care_type` varchar(191) not null, `scheduled_at` datetime not null, `nurse_name` varchar(191) null, `status` enum('planned', 'done', 'missed') not null default 'planned', `notes` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'

create table `telemedicine_sessions` (`id` bigint unsigned not null auto_increment primary key, `patient_id` bigint unsigned not null, `appointment_id` bigint unsigned null, `provider_name` varchar(191) null, `session_link` varchar(191) null, `scheduled_at` datetime not null, `status` enum('planned', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') not null default 'planned', `summary` text null, `created_by` int not null default '0', `created_at` timestamp null, `updated_at` timestamp null) default character set utf8mb4 collate 'utf8mb4_unicode_ci'
